title: poa trivialis var. koeleri
intro: Poa trivialis var. koeleri, also known as Koeler's bluegrass or Koeler's hair grass, is a subspecies of the bluegrass plant belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of certain flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Poa trivialis var. koeleri include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
